owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists.
selection_rule: Take the first ready unblocked chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; then verify and record evidence.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md Next worker-ready slice under Core Runtime Skeleton.

chunks.title: Expose release-companion-visible MP package state
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / Next worker-ready slice
chunks.goal: Make the current generated MP package state consumable from one stable evidence/status surface without scraping several outputs.
acceptance: A machine-readable status or evidence artifact exposes package readiness, path, hash, byte count, and reason fields.
Missing package, stale package, and not-exported states are explicit, not ambiguous nulls.
Relevant v0 pipeline or status tests cover the contract.

chunks.title: Clarify import/verify command surface
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / Next worker-ready slice
chunks.goal: Ensure host/client strict verify and import commands are copyable and stable for release-companion handoff.
acceptance: Evidence/status output contains explicit strict verify and import command hints.
Unsupported or missing command-hint values fail closed in tests.
Owner-facing next-step text points to the safe command when package identity risk exists.

chunks.title: Surface host/client readiness in Status Center
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / Next worker-ready slice
chunks.goal: Make Status Center explain host readiness and client gate state without requiring raw JSON inspection.
acceptance: Status Center summary includes host readiness and client readiness gate lines.
Ready, blocked, mismatch, and not-exported states produce distinct text.
Tests or golden output cover the expected lines.

chunks.title: Harden owner-facing package identity mismatch warning
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / Next worker-ready slice
chunks.goal: Ensure campaign, overlay, game version, mod version, and generated hash mismatches are visible as owner-critical warnings.
acceptance: Mismatch warnings are explicit booleans or stable enum fields in evidence/status output.
Aggregated next_action prioritizes identity risk over ordinary follow-up.
Regression tests cover at least one identity-risk plus ordinary-delta collision.

chunks.title: Stabilize one-file evidence consumption for release companion
chunks.goal: Verify the release companion can consume one structured evidence/status artifact instead of reconstructing state from many CLI streams.
acceptance: One artifact contains the fields needed for readiness, next action, package path/hash/bytes, command hints, and mismatch warning state.
A test fails if required fields disappear or become placeholder strings.
The roadmap records the artifact as the handoff source if verified.

chunks.title: Emit clear owner readiness report for the next real-session test
chunks.goal: When the v0 package/status path is ready, tell the owner exactly what to test and what evidence Codex will inspect afterward.
acceptance: A concise Task Board report or next-steps brief states the next real-session test instructions.
The report names the generated evidence path or command output to inspect after the owner test.
The report does not ask for manual code review.
